rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA UNION SQUARE L.P. VS. SAKS & COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Arbitrator Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc. Section 1281.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 9, 2018, Line 1. PETITIONER CALIFORNIA UNION SQUARE L.P.'S Motion To Appoint Arbitrator Pursuant To Cal. Code Civ. Proc. Section 1281.6. Paula Konikoff is appointed arbitrator. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 9, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANTS JOSEPH LYNCH, LAWRENCE BENNETT, NORMAN GREEN, JAMES MCINTYRE'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained as to causes of action 2 and 6 for plaintiff to allege facts showing that the referral agreement is not subject to the Statute of Frauds and to explain the discrepancy between allegations made in SAC re: breach starting shortly after August 2012 and allegations in TAC re: breach starting in retaliation to 2015 filing of a lawsuit. All amendments to be in bold font. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: POODLES, INC., VS. ROGER C. KUHN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 9, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANTS ROGER KUHN, RICHARD SAVAGE, MICHAEL INA, EUGENE LYNCH, SHERMAN WONG, ALL ANIMALS EMERGENCY HOSPITAL, INC., ALL ANIMALS PROPERTIES, LP, 1333 NINTH AVENUE, LLC'S JOINDER IN DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained as to causes of action 2 and 6 for plaintiff to allege facts showing that the referral agreement is not subject to the Statute of Frauds and to explain the discrepancy between allegations made in SAC re: breach starting shortly after August 2012 and allegations in TAC re: breach starting in retaliation to 2015 filing of a lawsuit. All amendments to be in bold font. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A FOR ITSELF AND AS SUCCESS VS. IRMA ENCINAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION /Jpmorgan Chase Bank, N.A.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Causes Of Action Or Issues Of Duty Against Chicago Title Company
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 9, 2018, Line 3. PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Causes Of Action Or Issues Of Duty Against Chicago Title Company. DENIED. Triable issues of fact exists regarding duty and breach of duty, e.g. Facts 30, 31. Objections to paragraphs 4 and 9 of Richards Declaration are overruled. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JESSICA LEE VS. BING YAO LIN ET AL
